one_liner: A letter postmarked today arrived addressed to someone who won't exist until 2064, and the handwriting changes depending on how you look at it.
prediction: Someone will come forward claiming to be the Correspondent, and their story will be either perfectly verifiable or perfectly impossible — I'm not sure which would be worse.

one_liner: The Amnesiac stopped searching and began pressing answers into the ground with their palms.
prediction: The floorboard impressions will form something readable, or the Amnesiac will vanish entirely — and I'm no longer certain which outcome I'm hoping for.

one_liner: The Amnesiac dug up something that was buried after it was found, and the dirt itself carried a message written in a timeline that flows backward.
prediction: The Amnesiac will return to the study and finally open the letter — but I don't think they'll be reading it for the first time.
